results.title: Staff AI/ML Architect, Embodied AI at Intuitive Surgical | Jeremy
highlights:
Staff AI/ML Architect, Embodied AI at Intuitive Surgical | Jeremy
...
# Staff AI/ML Architect, Embodied AI
...
Sunnyvale, CAOn-siteStaffML / AIBackend
...
Staff-level AI/ML architect role designing end-to-end hierarchical perception-reasoning-control systems for next-generation surgical robotics at Intuitive Surgical's Future Forward research organization.
...
Python C++ PyTorch TensorFlow Microservices LLM Computer Vision Deep Learning NLP Robotics Reinforcement Learning Optimization JAX Dagger JPA
...
We are building advanced augmented dexterity capabilities for next-generation robotic platforms. As a Staff AI/ML Architect, you will own the end-to-end architecture of our applied-AI system: a hierarchical, multimodal stack in which a high-level model interprets sensory observations and produces structured intent, and a low-level policy turns that intent into precise, safe, real-time control. You will set the technical direction the rest of the AI/ML team builds against, define the interfaces between perception, reasoning, and control, and make the architecture decisions that let us move safely from offline research to real-time deployment.
...
Working within Intuitive's Future Forward research organization, you will identify, build and finetune AI/ML models and algorithms and define the architecture that enables us to deliver safe and performant embodied AI systems. This role calls for someone who is equally comfortable getting hands-on with models and data and designing systems that scale.
...
- Define and own the end-to-end architecture for a hierarchical perception, reasoning, and control AI system.
...
contracts between layers: model outputs, policy interfaces, timing
...
, and safety hooks, and keep them stable as components are swapped and upgraded.
...
- Establish the path from offline evaluation on recorded data to real-time integration, including the continuous-improvement (human-in-the-loop) data loop.
...
- Partner with AI/ML researchers, robotics, data engineers, and other stakeholders to deliver a modular architecture that enables rapid prototyping and learning while working toward a product solution.
...
- MS or PhD in CS, EE, Robotics, or a related field with 10+ years building AI/ML models and algorithms for autonomous-systems software, with demonstrated ownership of an end-to-end AI/ML system architecture taken to production or to a rigorous prototype.
...
- Deep experience with hierarchical, modular AI/ML or robot-learning stacks, including high-level reasoning paired with low-level control policies.
...
- Strong grasp of real-time and safety-critical ML: latency budgets, failure modes, fallback/abort behavior, and interface/contract design across components.
...
- Hands-on expertise with modern deep learning and multimodal, vision-language, LLM-based architectures, including vision foundation models (VFM), vision-action (VA), and vision-language-action (VLA) models.
...
- Fluency in one of PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, and in Python and C++, is required.
...
- Working knowledge of world-model and self-supervised predictive architectures (e.g., JEPA-style models, MAE, DINO) and how learned world models inform perception-and-control design.
...
first principles.
...
- Background in healthcare, medical devices, surgical robotics, or other regulated technical domains.
...
- Foundation-model adaptation and fine-tuning for embodied robotics tasks.
...
- Experience delivering AI/ML in a real-time, safety-critical domain.
...
- Imitation learning, DAgger, and/or reinforcement learning at system scale.
...
- Sim-to-real workflows and experience with robotics simulators (e.g., NVIDIA Isaac Sim).
...
- Regulatory-aware AI/ML development for regulated, safety-critical industries.
...
- Triton kernel and/or CUDA development experiences
...
- Publications or recognized contributions at venues such as CVPR, NeurIPS, CoRL, RSS, or ICRA.

# Data Product Manager
...
HybridMid-
...
ProductData Science
...
Data Product Manager role at Intuitive Surgical combining product analytics, advanced analytics, and AI/ML to drive data-informed decisions for surgical technology products. Requires 3-6 years of product/analytics experience plus 5+ years with data warehouses and SQL.
...
The Product Manager will provide the Data Analytics & AI team an anchor and partner with cross-functional stakeholders at Intuitive to design, develop, and mature analytical capabilities. This person will deliver actionable business insights, drive data-informed product decisions, and architect robust analytical solutions enabling world-class product strategies. This critical role combines expertise in product analytics, business intelligence, data engineering, and data science to evaluate product health, user engagement, and adoption trends, and to identify and quantify opportunities for growth and improvement. The successful candidate is a detail-oriented, strategic thinker skilled in extracting value from data, designing scalable insight platforms, and communicating with diverse business and technology stakeholders.
...

...
Apply statistical techniques, machine learning models, and predictive analytics to understand and optimize product performance.

Rithvik is currently a Senior Data Scientist at Intuitive Surgical in Sunnyvale, CA, he provides data-driven solutions and insights for Intuitive’s digital products. With extensive experience in Data Science, Analytics, Data Manipulation, ETL, and Visualization, he specializes in churn analysis, network analytics, customer insights, and sales analytics. He holds a Master’s in Business Analytics from George Washington University (Dec 2017). Before that, he worked as a Senior Associate Analyst at Infosys Ltd, India, where he spent two years gaining valuable experience in the consumer packaged goods industry and sales analytics. Passionate about leveraging data to drive innovation and business growth, he continuously seeks new challenges to expand his expertise and make a meaningful impact. Technical Skills & Tools: Python, R, SQL, Tableau, Airflow, Snowflake, Splunk, Kibana, Jenkins, Excel, Git, UNIX & Jira Email: rithvik_mundra@gwu.edu Check out my code on my Github account:

highlights:
Staff Data Scientist at Intuitive Surgical

Staff Data Scientist at [Intuitive](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuitive-surgical)
...
#### Staff Data Scientist (Current)
...
Following the completion of the clinical study in Heidelberg, I decided to stay. As a result, my role transitioned to that of an individual contributor. I currently find myself often bridging the gap between the data generated from the robot, the data which is modeled, and the clinical insights that we'd like to understand. I consult with stakeholders in clinical engineering, clinical affairs, marketing, engineering, and support to offer realistic, timely, and informative answers to their questions, as well as work to improve their processes to enhance reporting in the future. With those in my team, I translate asks from these disparate groups into actionable, well-posed asks. Show less

, and others

in order for physicians
...
, as well as qualifying
...
Research advised by Professor Allison Okamura. Funding through an NRI-Large collaborative research grant entitled, "Multilateral Manipulation by Human-Robot Collaborative Systems". Multilateral manipulation is when a human operator controls one or more robot manipulators in partnership with one or more controllers. My research focuses on surgical applications of this human-centered autonomy. Completed work includes design of a software framework capable of supporting numerous collaboration strategies between a human and autonomous agent. This framework's first extension was to an inclusion segmentation task. Examples of collaboration strategies implemented include a fully autonomous algorithm, whereby numerous machine learning algorithms localize the hard inclusion, to supervised control, to pure teleoperation, shared control, and traded control. Results indicated tradeoffs in sensitivity, specificity, duration of experiment, and safety implications. This work used commercial Phantom haptic devices (Geomagic, Morrisville, NC, USA
...
Later on this work was extended to a de
...
ement task implemented on the RAVEN surgical platform (Applied
...
ity, Seattle, WA, USA) . This work combined the surgical
...
-tasks already investigated into an entire surgical procedure, whereby under a variety of collaboration models a human and a robotic agent can explore an artificial tissue for hard inclusions, cut its skin, and excise any hard inclusions detected
...
For the final chapter of my
...
, I extended the earlier work to a localization and electrocautery task, where a hard inclusion was located and then ablated, subject of course to several models of human-robot collaboration. I implemented this task on the da Vinci Research Kit (Intuitive Surgical, Sunnyvale, CA, USA). Show less

results.title: Martin Peng
highlights:
Director of AI and Data Science, Medical Technology at Intuitive
...
Director of AI and Data Science at [Intuitive](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuitive-surgical)
...
Focus on the application of AI technology in medical devices. Lead multiple cross-departmental projects to promote the intelligence of surgical robots and diagnostic tools, improve patient safety and promote FDA certification. Good at AI product development, cross-functional team management, and promote technological innovation and business transformation. Of course, in my spare time, I also like to exchange professional knowledge with people in the same or different fields. I look forward to your links.
...
#### Director of AI and Data Science (Current)
...
As the Director of AI and Data Science at Intuitive Surgical, I lead a team of data scientists and AI engineers focused on advancing the application of artificial intelligence in the medical device space. I am responsible for defining and executing the AI strategy, managing cross-functional collaborations, and driving the integration of cutting-edge AI and machine learning technologies into surgical robots and diagnostic tools. My role involves overseeing the development and optimization of machine learning models and data analytics systems, with a primary goal of improving patient safety, enhancing surgical outcomes, and promoting the FDA certification of AI-powered medical devices. Show less

I was responsible for expanding the global clinical applications of AI technology, ensuring its practical integration into surgical systems to improve patient safety and outcomes. I managed the AI model integration processes, ensuring compliance with clinical standards, and supported the FDA certification of AI-enhanced surgical tools.

Develop and optimize clinical AI solutions for surgical robots and promote the application of intelligent diagnosis and treatment. Develop surgical AI tools to improve surgical success rates, verify clinical effectiveness, and coordinate cross-departmental projects.
...

results.title: Vishnu P.
highlights:
Sr. ML Engineer: Advancing AI Agents, AIOps & MLOps
...
Machine Learning Engineer at [Intuitive](https://www.linkedin.com/company/intuitive-surgical)
...
As an experienced ML Engineer, I specialize in the deployment of Large Language Models (LLM), Deep Learning, and MLOps, using a wide range of tools and technologies. Machine Learning & AI: Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, PyPDF2, PDFMiner, CUDA, Computer Vision, OpenCV, Self-Supervised Learning, and Natural Language Processing (NLP). MLOps & DevOps: Expert in Kubeflow, MLFlow, Terraform, EKS, Docker, Kubernetes, Karpenter, CI/CD, Autoscaling, High-Availability Infrastructure, and Cloud Resource Management (AWS, Azure, GCP). Data Engineering: Skilled in Apache Spark, Pyspark, ETL Pipelines, Airflow, Dynamic DAG Generation, Snowflake, Elasticsearch, MS SQL Server, Data Lineage, and Metadata Management. Web Development: Experience in Django, Flask, ReactJS, Bootstrap, GraphQL, SSO Integration, Typescript, Ruby on Rails, and Microservices Architecture. Security & Performance Optimization: Implemented Container Vulnerability Scans, AWS Cloudfront, Route53 Security Measures, GPU-Acceleration with CUDA, AIOps Platforms, and Log Management using Fleet and Elasticsearch. Medical Data Processing: Worked with Medical Device Experience Data, FDA MAUDE, SARA, and SWISS MEDIC repositories. Experience in Recall Reconciliation Automation and Compliance Documentation. Sentiment Analysis & Text Clustering: Utilized Azure Text Analytics, Azure Cognitive Services, Google Cloud Natural Language API, and Google Cloud AutoML Natural Language for sentiment insights and text clustering. Innovation & Leadership: Spearheaded projects, led Validation, orchestrated sophisticated solutions, and streamlined processes through Automation. I'm passionate about harnessing the transformative power of technology, innovation, and collaboration. My work is characterized by a relentless pursuit of excellence, staying at the forefront of the ever-evolving landscape of AI. Feel free to connect to discuss opportunities, collaborations, or to exchange insights into the fascinating world of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Large Language Models, and AI.

I also outlined promising new directions for the team in order to leverage unlabeled data that are currently unused.

I wanted to celebrate some scientific work that was published earlier this year with my former colleagues at Intuitive 🎉 . 

We targeted the problem of automatically identifying surgical activities from surgical video with machine learning which is a foundational capability for surgical AI and data science. Across 2 publications, we quantified 

1. How do we best use un-labeled and unannotated surgical video data to pre-train surgical video models?
2. How do variabilities in surgical workflow affect the performance of state-of-the-art transformer models in identifying surgical activities?
...
Super excited to get this work out there 🙌 . Shout out to the co-authors Sree Ram Kamabattula ,
...
C. , and Conor
...
reault who actually did all of
...
work. Congrats team!
...
I recently closed a chapter in my life as I left Intuitive Surgical after almost 7 years. 

Reflecting on my time at Intuitive, I am proud of the AI and machine learning infrastructure we built for next-generation surgical AI and robotics. I worked with a talented team who consistently pushed the boundaries of what is possible. I wanted to take the opportunity to call out some key successes:
...
Expanding the IP Portfolio: Submitting multiple patents around novel deep learning and computer vision applications for surgical video and data.
...
peer-reviewed academic journals and presenting at international conferences.
...
Shipping Intelligent Systems: Scaling the ML architecture that integrates video-based deep learning models directly into core digital products.
...
To my direct reports, matrix managers, and the leadership team at Intuitive: thank you. Working with you to build the field of surgical data science and AI has been a highlight of my career. The digital ecosystem and AI-enabled products we built are a key differentiator for the new da Vinci system and the future of Intuitive . I look forward to seeing what you build next.

My hiring manager, Chauncey Graetzel, and I just opened two roles on our Future Forward team at Intuitive(Sunnyvale, CA): * Staff Systems Analyst – Robotic Control Algorithms, JOB216008 * Systems Analyst – Robotic Control Algorithms, JOB215938 This team focuses on how our robotic systems actually move and respond, designing the control algorithms and safety systems that translate user input into precise, stable, and reliable motion. You’ll be working across mechanical, electrical, and software domains to analyze prototypes, tune system behavior, and refine performance as these systems evolve toward real-world use. Staff Systems Analyst, we’re looking for: * Deep experience with servo control systems and real-time control algorithms * Strong background in robot modeling and system identification * Expertise developing real-time systems in C/C++ * Experience using Python or MATLAB/Simulink for modeling and analysis Systems Analyst, we’re looking for: * Experience implementing and tuning servo control and fault-detection algorithms * Strong foundation in robotics / control systems * Experience developing real-time algorithms in C/C++ * Working knowledge of Python or MATLAB/Simulink If either role aligns with your background and interests, take a look. Links to both roles are in the comments. If not, please share it with someone who’d be a strong fit. I’m always open to connecting on referrals.

I recently closed a chapter in my life as I left Intuitive Surgical after almost 7 years. 

Reflecting on my time at Intuitive, I am proud of the AI and machine learning infrastructure we built for next-generation surgical AI and robotics. I worked with a talented team who consistently pushed the boundaries of what is possible. I wanted to take the opportunity to call out some key successes:
...
Expanding the IP Portfolio: Submitting multiple patents around novel deep learning and computer vision applications for surgical video and data.
...
Shipping Intelligent Systems: Scaling the ML architecture that integrates video-based deep learning models directly into core digital products.

To my direct reports, matrix managers, and the leadership team at Intuitive: thank you. Working with you to build the field of surgical data science and AI has been a highlight of my career. The digital ecosystem and AI-enabled products we built are a key differentiator for the new da Vinci system and the future of Intuitive . I look forward to seeing what you build next.
...
A standardized ontology is a critical foundation for surgical AI. Congratulations to the multi-institutional team! Simon Bach Andrew Hung, MD, FACS Yusef Kudsi John Lazar Daniel Oh, MD, FACS Seth Rosen Naeem Soomro Dr. med. Christian Wagner We envision a future of care that is less invasive and profoundly better. This future requires more than just innovative technology. We must also explore ways to objectively track surgeon skill progression, standardize surgical training, and catalyze AI tool development to accelerate innovation.
...
Intuitive Clinical Science Manager Dr. Mallory Shields and Clinical Intelligence Manager Dr. Busi Mlambo, in collaboration with co-authors, have taken a critical early step on this journey of innovation. They’ve developed the first clinical temporal annotation guide library for ten robotic procedures, which is accompanied by a standardized, computer-readable ontology framework for surgical video annotation.
...
Imagine this: When a specific robotic instrument touches a specific target, models can be trained to recognize that moment, triggering the start or stop of a segment—a surgical phase, step, task, or subtask defined per procedure type. This transforms surgery from subjective description into objective, analyzable, and scalable data. Now imagine all the innovations these data will enable.
...
Today, we’re excited to share that Intuitive has officially received FDA clearance for our seventh-generation software for #IonByIntuitive —our minimally invasive peripheral lung biopsy platform.
 
With new AI navigation software, ML-based CBCT algorithms, and the addition of tomosynthesis integration to our advanced imaging portfolio, these clearances represent more than just the evolution of Ion. Each of these innovations is designed to deliver value for our customers and impact patient outcomes. That means empowering earlier diagnoses, supporting more confident care decisions, and expanding access to advanced imaging for patients and communities worldwide.
 
We listen to our customers. We learn from them. This shared patients-first mindset enables the continuous innovation that drives healthcare transformation at Intuitive. Now, the journey of innovation continues.
 
Read more about it in the press release: https://lnkd.in/exXu_3ZS #WeAreIntuitive

# Intuitive Surgical AI Engineer interview questions & guide 2026
...
### What is an AI Engineer at Intuitive Surgical?
...
As an **AI Engineer** at **Intuitive Surgical**, you are at the intersection of cutting-edge robotics and life-saving medical technology. Your work directly influences the performance of systems like the **da Vinci Surgical System**, where precision, reliability, and real-time data processing are not just goals—they are safety requirements. You will be tasked with developing, training, and deploying machine learning models that assist surgeons and improve patient outcomes through advanced computer vision, sensor fusion, or predictive analytics.
...
This role is both technically demanding and ethically significant. You are not merely optimizing for engagement or revenue; you are building intelligence for high-stakes
...
Success requires a deep commitment to rigorous testing, validation, and a clear understanding of how your algorithms interact with complex hardware and human users in
...
operating room.
...
These questions evaluate your fundamental understanding of machine learning frameworks, data pipeline construction, and model architecture.
...
16Evaluate an LLM SystemGenerative AI & LLMsMediumVery common
...
Preparation for an **AI Engineer** role at **Intuitive Surgical** requires a blend of deep technical mastery and a structured approach to problem-solving. Your interviewers are looking for candidates who can demonstrate not just the "how" of their work, but the "why" behind their architectural choices.
...
#### Machine Learning Fundamentals
...
#### System Design for AI
...
As an **AI Engineer**, you will spend your time building the intelligence that powers our surgical platforms. This involves developing sophisticated machine learning models, optimizing them for high-performance hardware, and working closely with software and systems engineers to ensure seamless integration.
...
You will likely lead the end-to-end lifecycle of an AI feature. This includes gathering requirements, performing exploratory data analysis, prototyping models, and participating in the rigorous validation cycles required for medical devices. You will also act as a technical advisor, helping the team understand the potential and limitations of current AI technologies.
...
To be successful, you must possess a strong foundation in computer science or a related engineering field, with specialized experience in machine learning.
...
* **Must-have skills**: Proficiency in Python and C++, deep understanding of deep learning frameworks (such as PyTorch or TensorFlow), and experience with computer vision or signal processing.
...
* **Nice-to-have skills**: Experience working in a regulated industry (e.g., medical devices, aerospace), familiarity with real-time operating systems, and experience with edge deployment.
...
The **AI Engineer** position at **Intuitive Surgical** is a unique opportunity to apply your technical expertise to challenges that have a profound impact on human lives. By focusing on deep technical preparation, structural problem-solving, and a clear articulation of your design philosophy, you can demonstrate that you are the right candidate to help us push the boundaries of robotic surgery.
...

Hi! My name is Pedro — I worked for several years as an Industrial Engineer in Puerto Rico, and I recently moved to California to pursue a career in Industrial Engineering/Data Analytics. My interests are mostly focused on data analysis, project management, and process optimization. As a first-generation graduate, I'm always looking for ways to further my education by actively enrolling in online courses and working on personal projects. Research Fellow / Research Scientist @Harvard: Generative AI, Vision-Language Models, and Medical Image Analysis

- Develop AI pipelines for clinical text, radiology reports, electronic health record data, and medical images.

...

...

Interested candidates should send a CV, a brief statement of research interests, and examples of relevant code, publications, or projects to: sila.kurugol@childrens.harvard.edu

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
AI Scientist II | Wfh
...
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

Intuit is the global financial technology platform that powers prosperity for the people and communities we serve. With over 100 million customers worldwide using our flagship products - TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, and Mailchimp, we believe that everyone should have the opportunity to prosper. Intuit’s strategy is to be a global AI-driven expert platform delivering world-class experiences for our customers at unprecedented speed and scale. With AI at the heart of the strategy, Intuit has created a new organization led by our Chief AI Officer to drive Intuit’s evolution as a global AI technology leader through a dedicated research and innovation focus and a partnership with leading academic and industry organizations. Intuit’s AI teams have access to rich data and production grade AI platforms, enabling our scientists and engineers to move quickly from research to impact.
...
We are seeking a self-motivated, hands-on Principal AI Engineer who operates with a high degree of autonomy and builds impactful products with high velocity to join Intuit’s Foresight organization. You will be responsible for leveraging the latest advances in AI to solve complex, high-impact technical problems that unlock entirely new AI-driven experiences through the new 0 → 1 AI native products that you will build. Your work will directly shape how millions of Intuit’s customers, both small businesses and individuals, prosper through the effective use of AI within our platforms and products. If you are a builder who loves to ship fast, learn continuously, and independently drive impact, then this is the right role for you.

The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.

The Senior Principal Data Scientist will report to Director of Growth and Data Science in the Experience Foundations organization. This is a founding data science role for our agentic product platform — a next-generation framework that combines domain-specific AI agents into a unified harness enabling complex, multi-step, personalized work across product surfaces. As Senior Principal Data Scientist, you will help build the fundamental experiences of this new platform as well as define and predict what success for users and the product look like.
...
You'll work at the intersection of predictive modeling, behavioral analytics, and AI system design — partnering closely with product, engineering, and platform teams to build the measurement and intelligence tools and where appropriate, infrastructure, that this product needs to learn, adapt, and grow.
